valueMoments.trigger: First position created (0→1 positions) or first assignment made (0→1 filled)
valueMoments.currentPresentation: Fixed bottom banner: 'Your org chart is live.' or 'Position filled — org chart is live.' with optional 'Assign person' CTA; dismissible
valueMoments.valueSignal: Early milestone confirmation that structure exists and is operational

valueMoments.trigger: Any loaded org state with positions/actions
valueMoments.currentPresentation: Header pills: positions count, filled count, open actions count, needs attention count (urgent styling when >0)
valueMoments.valueSignal: At-a-glance org health and workload signals
Coverage ratio — how much of the structure is staffed

valueMoments.trigger: Position has active assignment, is vacant, or has structural issue
valueMoments.currentPresentation: Per-node badge: Active (green), Open (vacant), or Needs attention (amber); person name or 'Open role' on card
valueMoments.valueSignal: Visual proof that positions are owned and structurally sound

valueMoments.currentPresentation: Green occupant summary card with initials avatar, name, 'Active assignment' label
valueMoments.valueSignal: Confirmation that a specific position is staffed

valueMoments.currentPresentation: 2.6s success toast; org chart node updates to filled state

valueMoments.trigger: User uploads role document or changes signature state
valueMoments.currentPresentation: File card with name, upload date, size; signature status dropdown; 'Open document' button
valueMoments.valueSignal: Compliance evidence attached to a position

valueMoments.currentPresentation: Flat list with title, link label, owner, due date, status badge, Start/Mark Done transitions

valueMoments.trigger: Founder fills all created positions (filled === positions, positions > 1)
valueMoments.currentPresentation: No dedicated completion moment; only static org chart and header counts
valueMoments.valueSignal: Org-wide 'you built your operating system' confirmation

valueMoments.trigger: Multiple positions with documents, missing contact info, or unsigned JDs
valueMoments.currentPresentation: No org-level evidence/compliance summary; only per-position Documents tab
valueMoments.valueSignal: Founder sees accumulated compliance value across the entire org

valueMoments.trigger: Actions with blocked:true or past dueDate
valueMoments.currentPresentation: Aggregate 'needs attention' badge in header only; individual actions do not show blocked or overdue flags
valueMoments.valueSignal: Actionable urgency signals the system is actively monitoring execution

deadEndMoments.screen: Org Chart — after all positions assigned
deadEndMoments.description: Filled org chart with green Active nodes, header counts, and collapsible Structure controls — no next-step prompt
deadEndMoments.afterHappyPath: OrgReadyBanner only fires for first assignment (filledCount===1), not full coverage. Toast auto-dismisses. User has no guided path to Actions, Evidence, or Policies.

deadEndMoments.screen: Position panel — Assignment tab after assign
deadEndMoments.description: Green occupant card persists but no progression cue to Evidence tab or Actions
deadEndMoments.afterHappyPath: Assignment saved → toast → same panel state; user must self-discover tab 3 Evidence

deadEndMoments.description: Execution list with create form; no link back to org setup progress
deadEndMoments.afterHappyPath: Empty state 'No actions yet for this position.' with no guided first action creation

deadEndMoments.description: Single download button with no connection to org state or unfilled evidence gaps
deadEndMoments.afterHappyPath: User downloads generic JD template with no context about which positions need it

deadEndMoments.description: Read-only people table with Delete only — no create/edit shortcut, no link to org chart nodes
deadEndMoments.afterHappyPath: Passive directory with no retention hook after people are created

deadEndMoments.description: Dev-oriented utilities: org ID, payroll CSV export, demo reset, recovery check
deadEndMoments.afterHappyPath: Founder who reaches admin sees internal tooling, not product value confirmation

retentionOpportunities.opportunity: Clickable health badges that drill into filtered views (vacant positions, overdue actions, blocked items)
retentionOpportunities.gap: No navigation from aggregate signals to actionable queues

retentionOpportunities.opportunity: Daily operating rhythm — review open actions, transition statuses, clear blockers
retentionOpportunities.currentState: Manual list with Start/Mark Done; no recurring review prompt
retentionOpportunities.gap: No inbox-zero mechanic, no 'good morning, here are today's priorities'

retentionOpportunities.opportunity: Org-wide evidence score nudging founders to upload and sign pending role documents
retentionOpportunities.currentState: Per-position upload with local state; no org-wide evidence score
retentionOpportunities.gap: No compliance progress bar, no unsigned JD reminders

retentionOpportunities.opportunity: Return visits driven by compliance alerts on org nodes
retentionOpportunities.currentState: positionComplianceAlerts computed (missing email/phone) but never rendered in UI
retentionOpportunities.gap: Compliance alerts computed but fully invisible

retentionOpportunities.opportunity: Position-scoped action backlog indicator on org nodes
retentionOpportunities.currentState: positionActionStats computed (open/overdue/blocked per position) but never rendered
retentionOpportunities.gap: Action debt per position completely invisible from org view

retentionOpportunities.opportunity: Recurring payroll/HR export after org changes
retentionOpportunities.currentState: downloadPayrollCsv() exists but buried in admin
retentionOpportunities.gap: No prompt after assignment changes, no visible export hook in context

upgradeOpportunities.proposedHook: 'Connect API to persist changes' upgrade CTA when user hits read-only wall
Post-setup prompt to enable Actions/Policies modules or invite team members — natural expansion moment
E-signature integration upsell at the moment evidence compliance is being attempted
Template library with industry-specific role packs beyond single generic download
Gate advanced exports (compliance reports, audit logs) behind paid tier after founder sees data value

trustBuildingOpportunities.description: Summary sentence tying visual to business outcome
trustBuildingOpportunities.currentState: Static filled org chart nodes with green badges
trustBuildingOpportunities.gap: No narrative: '8 roles accountable, 0 gaps, 3 actions in flight'

trustBuildingOpportunities.description: System surfaces overdue + blocked action count proactively
trustBuildingOpportunities.currentState: Urgent red styling when needsAttention > 0; but not clickable
trustBuildingOpportunities.gap: Signal exists, action is impossible — erodes trust in urgency indicator

trustBuildingOpportunities.description: Debug-style path labels ('Path: assignment > person > position') erode founder trust
trustBuildingOpportunities.currentState: Technical copy on every action card
trustBuildingOpportunities.gap: Should be plain-language accountability chain; 'Owned by Jane Smith · Engineering'

trustBuildingOpportunities.description: Persistent sync confirmation beyond transient mutation status
trustBuildingOpportunities.currentState: mutationStatusText appears during save then disappears
trustBuildingOpportunities.gap: No persistent 'last saved X minutes ago' for ongoing trust

trustBuildingOpportunities.description: Audit trail for document lifecycle changes
trustBuildingOpportunities.currentState: Manual state dropdown with no audit record
trustBuildingOpportunities.gap: No 'signed by / on' record; completeness is unverifiable

computedButHiddenValue.data: positionActionStats — per-position { open, overdue, blocked } counts
computedButHiddenValue.currentUse: Computed in useMemo; never referenced in JSX
computedButHiddenValue.missedOpportunity: Org chart node badges, position panel header, Actions grouping by position

computedButHiddenValue.data: positionComplianceAlerts — missing email/phone count per assigned position
computedButHiddenValue.missedOpportunity: Compliance indicators on org nodes, Team directory rows, health badge drill-down

computedButHiddenValue.data: teamOwnershipMap / positionOwnershipMap — responsibility owners with context strings
computedButHiddenValue.currentUse: Maps built from API data; assignment handlers exist but have no UI
computedButHiddenValue.missedOpportunity: Ownership layer in org chart, Team section, post-setup accountability summary

computedButHiddenValue.currentUse: blocked contributes to blockedActions aggregate only; description in seed but not shown
computedButHiddenValue.missedOpportunity: Blocked badge and description text in Actions list to explain needs attention count

computedButHiddenValue.data: overdueActions and blockedActions — separate computed values
computedButHiddenValue.missedOpportunity: Separate overdue/blocked queues in Actions; filtered views from header badges

computedButHiddenValue.currentUse: Implicit in org chart subtitle only
computedButHiddenValue.missedOpportunity: Dedicated 'open roles' health badge with link to vacant nodes

computedButHiddenValue.currentUse: Used only to filter Actions owner dropdown
computedButHiddenValue.missedOpportunity: Level badges on org nodes, hierarchy summary, level-based health metrics
Person avatar initials in Team directory, position panel occupant card, Actions owner display

topUXDebt.issue: No value confirmation moment when founder completes org setup. OrgReadyBanner only fires on first position/first assignment — not full coverage. After setup the founder sees an identical editing surface with no 'you did it', no org health narrative, and no guided next step.

positionActionStats, positionComplianceAlerts, and ownership maps are computed/loaded but never rendered. The product appears dumber than its data model. Founder cannot perceive any accumulated organizational intelligence.

topUXDebt.screen: AppShell + Actions — urgency signals without resolution path
topUXDebt.issue: needs attention badge aggregates overdue+blocked but is not clickable. Actions list hides blocked/overdue status and description per item. Urgency is broadcast but the system provides no way to act on it.

topUXDebt.screen: Position panel — Evidence tab underdelivers on compliance value
topUXDebt.issue: Step 3 Evidence shows empty labels for role description/responsibilities/KPIs. Document state is local-only (lost on refresh). No org-wide compliance rollup. The compliance value proposition from EmptyOrgGuide is never delivered post-setup.

Administration COO walkthrough text promises 'Org Map → Teams → Owners → Actions → Policies' but Owners step has no UI. Ownership assignment handlers and demo data exist but are invisible. Breaks trust in product completeness.

postHappyPathAnalysis.lastMeaningfulAction: Assign person / save assignment on the Position panel Assignment tab, which produces a filled org chart node and brief success toast
postHappyPathAnalysis.afterThatAction: 2.6s success toast auto-dismisses. If first-ever assignment: OrgReadyBanner shows fill ratio then dismisses. User sees unchanged org chart with health badges and no guided next step.
postHappyPathAnalysis.nowWhatProblem: After completing positions and assignments, the founder lands on a static org chart that looks identical to the editing surface they just used — no completion state, no org health narrative, no bridge to Actions/Policies/Evidence, and no reason to return beyond self-motivated exploration of six flat nav sections that do not reference setup progress.
retentionHooksMissing: Full-setup completion moment with org coverage summary and guided next steps
Clickable health badges leading to actionable queues (vacant roles, overdue actions, blocked items)
Ownership accountability view from teamOwnerships/positionOwnerships data
Per-position action backlog indicators from positionActionStats on org nodes
Post-assignment nudge to complete Evidence tab (step 3)
Payroll export prompt after staffing changes
Return-visit alerts for needs_attention nodes and unsigned/outdated documents
API mode upgrade prompt when demo read-only blocks persistence
Operating rhythm hook tying Actions to a daily/weekly review loop
